GEP_X91_V11

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 742
Recv ID: 762
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 04
Func Name: EPS

      },

      },

        "bitoffset": 1,

      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "bitoffset": 5
      }
    }
